title: BROADCAST/SEALED_BROADCAST accept zero-length payload — fan-out amplification
description: relay/src/ws.rs:650: after rate-limit and subscription checks pass, params.payload (BROADCAST) and params.sealed (SEALED_BROADCAST) are forwarded to all peers with no minimum-length check. A base64-encoded empty string decodes to a zero-byte Vec. The relay fans this out as DELIVER/SEALED_DELIVER to every peer, who each fail MLS decryption and log errors. A rate-limited client can sustain a steady stream of zero-byte fan-out events. Fix: add is_empty() check after deserialization, reject with INVALID_REQUEST.
